landing.heroDesc: One app to manage tasks, build habits, and stay focused. Projects, Pomodoro timer, calendar — everything you need, nothing you don't.
landing.startForFree: Start for free — no card needed
landing.proofText: Join thousands who finally got organized
landing.feature1Desc: Subtasks, priorities, deadlines, tags. Filter, search, and create tasks in seconds.
landing.feature2Desc: Group tasks into projects with kanban-style sections and real-time progress.
landing.feature3Desc: Build streaks, track routines, and watch your consistency grow every day.
landing.feature4Desc: Deep focus sessions with configurable breaks. Stay in the zone.
landing.feature5Desc: See your entire schedule at a glance. Never miss a deadline again.
landing.feature6Desc: Your data syncs across all devices. Works perfectly offline too.
landing.tasksTitle: Tasks that work the way you do
tasksPoints: Smart priority sorting with color coding
Quick search across all your tasks
habitsPoints: Custom icons and colors for each habit
landing.why1Desc: No clutter, no bloat. A minimal interface that stays out of your way.
landing.why2Desc: Dark, Light, and Midnight. Switch instantly from settings.
landing.why3Desc: Data syncs across all your devices. Works offline too.
landing.why4Desc: No ads, no analytics, no third-party trackers. Just your tool.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your time?
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of people who finally got organized. Free forever — no credit card, no ads, no tricks.
landing.faq1A: Yes. No credit card, no trial, no hidden fees. All features are available for free forever.
landing.faq2Q: Can I sync my data across devices?
landing.faq2A: Yes. Your tasks, projects, and habits sync automatically across all your devices via our cloud service.
landing.faq3A: Yes. You can export all your tasks, projects, and habits as JSON or CSV at any time.
landing.faq4A: 100%. No ads, no analytics, no third-party trackers. Your data stays on your devices.
landing.faq5A: Simply create a free account and start adding your tasks. No setup required, no credit card needed.
landing.faq6A: We release updates regularly with new features, improvements, and bug fixes based on user feedback.

download.title: Download CuTasks
download.desc: Get the desktop app for your platform. Fast, lightweight, and always free.
download.comingSoonDesc: We're actively developing a native version for {{platform}}. Stay tuned!
download.useWeb: In the meantime, use the web version:
download.footerText: CuTasks is free and open source. No ads, no tracking.

confirm.deleteSectionMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this section? Tasks in it will become top-level tasks.

shakeQuotes: You've got this. One task at a time.
Small steps lead to big results.
You're doing better than you think.
Keep going. Your future self will thank you.
One more task. You're almost there.
Discipline is choosing what you want most.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to CuTasks, and thanks for checking us out. When you use CuTasks ("the Application"), you agree to these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you don't accept these Terms, please don't use the Application.
terms.s1: You need to be at least 13 years old and have the legal right to make this agreement to use CuTasks. If you're using CuTasks on behalf of an organization, you're confirming you have the authority to bind them to these Terms too.
terms.s2: CuTasks is a task management app designed to help you stay organized. Here's what you can do with it:
terms.s2a: Create, edit, and organize tasks with priorities, deadlines, tags, and subtasks
terms.s2b: Manage projects with sections and track progress
terms.s2c: Track habits, monitor streaks, and schedule habits weekly
terms.s2d: Use a Pomodoro timer to focus during work sessions
terms.s2e: See and plan your schedule with a calendar view
terms.s2f: Sync your data across devices through the cloud
terms.s3a: Sign up with a valid email and set your password.
terms.s3b: Keep your credentials safe — whatever happens under your account is your responsibility.
terms.s3c: If you notice any unauthorized activity on your account, let us know right away.
terms.s4a: You own whatever you create in CuTasks, whether it's tasks, projects, or anything else ("User Content").
terms.s4b: By using CuTasks, you let us store, process, and display your content, but only so we can give you the service.
terms.s4c: We don't claim ownership of your data. You can export or delete it whenever you like.
terms.s5a: Break the law or encourage illegal activity
terms.s5b: Try to access parts of the app or systems you're not supposed to
terms.s5c: Mess with or disrupt the app or connected servers
terms.s5d: Use bots, scrapers, or other automation without our explicit permission
terms.s5e: Upload harmful stuff like viruses or malware
terms.s5g: Store or share illegal, harmful, or abusive content
terms.s6a: CuTasks saves your data locally in your browser with LocalStorage for offline use and quick access.
terms.s6b: When you sign up, your data updates to our cloud (encrypted during transfer and storage).
terms.s6c: Only you can access your data — nobody else can see it.
terms.s6d: The app works offline, and anything you do will sync once you're back online.
terms.s6e: As long as your account is active, we keep your data. If you delete your account, we erase everything from our servers within 30 days.
terms.s7a: CuTasks owns the application — design, code, graphics, documents, all of it. Copyrights, trademarks, and other rights protect it.
terms.s7b: Don't copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of CuTasks unless we agree in writing.
terms.s8a: We use third-party providers for stuff like hosting, authentication, and storage.
terms.s8b: Their terms and privacy policies also apply when you use their features.
terms.s8c: We're not liable for things those providers do.
terms.s9a: CuTasks is offered "as is" and "as available," without any kind of warranty.
terms.s9b: We can't guarantee the app will always be up and running, never have bugs, or be perfectly secure.
terms.s9c: We can't promise results you get from the app will be totally accurate or reliable.
terms.s10a: To the fullest extent allowed by law, CuTasks isn't responsible for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
terms.s10b: If you make a claim, our liability is capped at what you paid us over the past 12 months.
terms.s10c: We're not responsible for lost data, lost profits, or interruptions resulting from using CuTasks.
terms.s11: If your use of CuTasks causes any kind of legal trouble (claims, losses, damages, costs — including lawyer fees), you'll cover us, our officers, directors, employees, and agents for:
terms.s12a: We can update these Terms at any time.
terms.s12b: For major changes, we'll email or notify you in the app at least 30 days before they take effect.
terms.s12c: If you keep using CuTasks after the changes, that means you accept the new Terms.
terms.s13a: You can close your account anytime in the app settings.
terms.s13b: We can suspend or shut down your access if you break these Terms, at our own discretion, with or without warning.
terms.s13c: When terminated, your access stops right away. You have 30 days to export your data, and then we delete it permanently.
terms.s14: These Terms follow the laws of where CuTasks operates, no matter what your local laws say.
terms.s15a: If there's a dispute, we'll try to sort things out together first.
terms.s15b: If we can't, we'll use binding arbitration according to the relevant rules.
terms.s16: If any part of these Terms doesn't hold up legally, the rest still applies.
terms.s17: These Terms are everything between you and CuTasks regarding the Application. They replace any previous agreements or understandings.
terms.closing: Thanks for using CuTasks. We're here to give you a secure, reliable, and user-friendly way to manage your tasks and stay on top of things.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At CuTasks ("we," "our," or "us"), your privacy matters. Here's what happens with your data when you use our task management app.
privacy.s1a: When you sign up, we ask for:
privacy.s1a1: Your email address (for logging in and managing your account)
privacy.s1a2: Display name (how you'll show up in the app)
privacy.s1a3: Password (we store a secure hash — never the password itself)
privacy.s1b: You create and store things like:
privacy.s1b1: Tasks (titles, descriptions, priorities, deadlines, tags, status, parent/child links)
privacy.s1b3: Sections (names and how they're organized in projects)
privacy.s1b4: Habits (names, icons, colors, schedules, history, streaks)
privacy.s1b5: Pomodoro timer settings (work/break durations, timer state)
privacy.s1b6: App settings (theme, language, week start day, how long to keep completed tasks)
privacy.s1c1: Device details (browser, operating system, screen size)
privacy.s1c2: How you use the app (features, session length, what you interact with)
privacy.s1d: We use your browser's LocalStorage to:
privacy.s1d1: Keep your data handy even when you're offline
privacy.s1d3: Remember your Pomodoro timer between sessions
privacy.s2a1: Keep the app running and up-to-date
privacy.s2a3: Make sure you're you when you log in
privacy.s2b1: Let you know about account stuff (password changes, account deletion)
privacy.s2b3: Share important service updates (but you can opt out)
privacy.s3a1: Your data lives in secure cloud servers spread around the world
privacy.s3a2: Some info also stays in your browser for offline use
privacy.s3a3: Everything's encrypted during transmission (TLS 1.3) and at rest
privacy.s3a4: Data is isolated per user with strict access controls
privacy.s3b1: Passwords are hashed — nobody sees the real thing
privacy.s3b3: We block suspicious activity with rate limiting
privacy.s3c1: Active accounts: we keep your data until you delete your account
privacy.s3c2: Delete your account: everything's wiped within 30 days
privacy.s3c3: Inactive for 2+ years: we'll warn you, then archive if you don't respond
privacy.s3c4: Data in LocalStorage sticks around until you clear your browser
privacy.s3d1: We use cookies and browser LocalStorage to keep your session active and save preferences
privacy.s3d2: These are strictly necessary for the app to function — no tracking or advertising cookies are used
privacy.s3d3: You can clear your browser data at any time to remove stored cookies and LocalStorage
privacy.s3d4: Clearing browser data may log you out and remove offline-cached information
privacy.s4a: We never sell, rent, or trade your personal info.
privacy.s4b2: If the law or courts require us
privacy.s4b3: To protect the rights, safety, or property of CuTasks or others
privacy.s4b4: With trusted service providers who help keep CuTasks running, and only as needed
privacy.s4c: Sometimes we share bundled, anonymous stats for research or analysis — nothing that identifies you.
privacy.s5a2: Cloud storage: To store and sync data
privacy.s5a3: Analytics: Only if you enable it
privacy.s5b1: No ads, tracking pixels, or social media trackers
privacy.s5b2: No Google Analytics or similar trackers by default
privacy.s6a1: See everything stored in your account
privacy.s6a2: Export your stuff in standard formats
privacy.s6a3: Ask for a copy of your data
privacy.s6b: Change or fix your info any time in app settings.
privacy.s6c: Delete your account (and all data) any time under Settings → Delete Account. It's permanent.
privacy.s6e: Export your data whenever you like. Once your account is gone, we don't keep anything behind.
privacy.s7b: We don't collect info from anyone under 13 on purpose.
privacy.s7c: If we find out we have, we'll delete it right away.
privacy.s8a: Your info might be processed in other countries.
privacy.s8b: Our providers keep things safe and up to current legal standards, wherever the servers are.
privacy.s8c: By using CuTasks, you're OK with your data moving between countries as needed.
privacy.s9b: We use only what's needed for authentication and sessions.
privacy.s9c: Set your cookie preferences in your browser.
privacy.s10a: We update this policy from time to time.
privacy.s10b: We'll let you know via email, an in-app message, or by updating the date at the top.
privacy.s10c: If you keep using the app after an update, you accept the new policy.
privacy.s11a: Change your display name, password, theme, language, or how long we keep completed tasks.
privacy.s11b: You decide what to create/store, when to sync, and when to delete your account.
privacy.s11c: You can unsubscribe from non-essential emails or service update announcements.
privacy.s12: If a breach affects your personal info, we'll tell you within 72 hours by email, explain what happened, share what we're doing to fix it, and give you tips to keep your account safe.
privacy.s13a: Questions? Contact the CuTasks Privacy Team at:
privacy.s14a: Under GDPR, you have rights to restrict/opt-out of processing and file complaints with regulators.
privacy.s14b: Your rights under CCPA/CPRA include knowing what personal info we collect, deleting your info, opting out of "selling" data (we don't sell), and no discrimination for using your rights.
privacy.s14c: We follow all privacy laws where we operate.
privacy.closing: We take your privacy seriously and want you to feel confident using CuTasks. If you're ever unsure or have a question, reach out. We're here to help.
